diff_kinds.compares: two versions of a node by id; structural + semantic field-level diff
promotion/demotion event chain for a node
binding chain from node to OEM source artifact
rollback chain referencing original promotion ids

invariants: diffs are deterministic and reproducible from append-only logs
lineage is never reconstructed; it is read directly from the event store
diffs do not mutate; they only report
diffs respect scope (per product, per domain); cross-product diffs are forbidden
lineage_views: operational-history: chronological event stream per node
trust-evolution-visualization: tier-over-time per node (data; no rendering layer)
